name: Quilt
description: Half-square triangle patchwork in fabric tones — each block re-cuts its diagonal and trades patches on every redraw.

code.style: --patch: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --patch2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --cut: @p(polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%), polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 0% 100%), polygon(0% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%), polygon(100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 94%; height: 94%; margin: 3%; background: var(--patch); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--patch2); clip-path: var(--cut); transition: ease 500ms; } } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
